attempts.test_code:
from source import process_batch

def test_process_batch_does_not_skip_last_item():
    items = [1, 2, 3]
    result = process_batch(items)
    # The bug causes the last element to be skipped, so result length is one less.
    # Fixed code should include all items.
    assert len(result) == len(items), (
        f"Expected result length {len(items)}, got {len(result)}. "
        "The loop likely uses range(len(items)-1), skipping the last element."
    )
